CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Written Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kevin P. Whiteford
Off Calendar Jan-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Whiteford, Esq. 916-446-0790 of Serline & Whiteford LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANC OF AMERICA LEASING & CAPITAL LLC's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Written Settlement Agreement.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed.(see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Written Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kevin P. Whiteford
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANC OF AMERICA LEASING & CAPITAL LLC's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Written Settlement Agreement is Off calendar per the request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
